topics: Logic gates - Basic gates and Universal gates

SOP & POS- minterm and maxterm expansion Minimization technique
Ripple carry and Carry look ahead adders

Tristate logic configuration. Suggestion on Project Topics 1.Literature Review and Presentation on Digital Electronics Applications ● Choose a specific application of digital electronics preferably in biomedical field(e.g
digital health monitoring etc) ● Conduct a literature review on the chosen application
and real-world implementations 2. Selection of Digital Electronics Components ● Teams of preferably 4 members select specific digital electronic components relevant to their chosen application (e.g
actuators). ● Justify the selection based on technical specifications
and compatibility with biomedical requirements. 3. Analysis and Presentation of Digital Electronic Components ● Analyze the working principles
and application considerations of the selected digital electronic components. ● Present findings to the class
focusing on how these components contribute to achieving project objectives. 4. Design

and Testing of Digital Electronics System ● Design and develop a comprehensive digital electronics system based on the selected components and application. ● Implement necessary digital logic circuits
and interface design as per project requirements 5. Implementation of Digital Electronics Project ● Implement necessary digital logic circuits
and interface design as per project requirements. ● Collaboratively create a fully functional digital electronics project. ● Document the design process
and results. ● Prepare a detailed project report outlining methodology
and future improvements 6. Project Evaluation ● Mid-term Evaluation (After one month
and initial project outcomes. ● Final Evaluation (End of Course
Evaluate the completed digital electronics project based on functionality
and documentation quality. Conduct a final presentation to demonstrate the project to the class
